mapper.sql: t0.id, t0.tenant_id, t0.creator, t0.create_stamp, t0.last_editor, t0.last_edit_stamp, t0.source_id, t0.bill_type, t0.do_id, t0.do_type, t0.security_way, t0.security_type, t0.reve_name, t0.reve_measure, t0.is_dispose, t0.dispose_money, t0.preserve_date, t0.remark, t0.debt_repayment_date, t0.debt_repayment_money, t0.preserve_type, t0.preserve_apply_date, t0.preserve_rule_date, t0.insure_money, t0.is_deleted
